title: Uniqhia Inflatable Reindeer Antler Ring Toss Game, 2023 Christmas Games Ring Toss for Christmas Party Games, US Patented
features: Fun Ring Toss Game for Family: Add fun to your Christmas party with this inflatable ring toss game. Perfect for Christmas holiday party favors, school day, indoor and outdoor game.
Wonderful Xmas Party Game: Designed in reindeer antlers shape, stylish and cute, each reindeer antler hat has two tethers to prevent the reindeer horn hat from falling
Super Valuable Reindeer Ring Toss Game Set: 2 Inflatable reindeer antler hats; 10 inflatable rings; 2 red deer noses; and a little air pump
Easy to Inflate and Deflate: Increasing the happy Christmas atmosphere and suit for both kids and adults. Reindeer Antler Hats are 24.8 x 9.8 inches. Rings are 7.2 inch to 7.5 inch.
Great Xmas Christams Gift: Kids ring toss game can help positively channel a child's physical and mental energy, also help a child improve concentration skills.
